scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm -w @singedterra/client run build
scripts.deploy:backend: npx supabase db push --yes && npx supabase functions deploy --use-api --yes
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:client
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @singedterra/shared run typecheck && npm -w @singedterra/client run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npx tsx scripts/checks/determinism.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/collision.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/timestep.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/turnstate.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/gameover.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/burial.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/airburst.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/weapons2.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/wind.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/ammo.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/motion.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/shield.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/store.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/ai.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/lockstep.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/turn_rotation.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/rounds.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/scoreboard.mjs && npx tsx scripts/checks/netrounds.mjs
